data.name: Intro
data.value: A clear step-by-step process from your request to a bright laser show at your event.

data.name: Step1Text
data.value: You leave a request on the website, contact us in a messenger or call us. We receive the basic information about your event.

data.name: Step2Text
data.value: We clarify the date, venue, event format, number of guests, indoor or outdoor conditions and your main wishes.

data.name: Step3Text
data.value: Together we choose the best format: animation show, beam show, combined show, ready-made story or custom scenario.

data.name: Step4Text
data.value: We agree on the video story, music, names, date, logo, congratulation text and other personal elements.

data.name: Step5Text
data.value: We calculate the final cost based on the show type, duration, complexity, location and additional equipment if needed.

data.name: Step6Text
data.value: After all details are approved, we sign an agreement, fix the event date and receive an advance payment.

data.name: Step7Text
data.value: Our team prepares graphics, adapts the selected story, adds personal elements and checks the technical part.

data.name: Step8Text
data.value: On the event day we arrive in advance, install the equipment, check the projection and prepare everything for the show.

data.name: Step9Text
data.value: We run the laser show at the agreed time. The remaining payment is made on the event day unless otherwise agreed.

data.name: NeedItem3
data.value: Event format and approximate number of guests

data.name: NeedItem4
data.value: Indoor or outdoor location, screen, facade or projection surface

data.name: NeedItem5
data.value: Desired duration, music and personal elements

data.name: PaymentText
data.value: The event date is booked after the details are approved and an advance payment is made. The remaining amount is usually paid on the event day. Exact payment terms are agreed individually and can be fixed in the agreement.

data.name: CtaText
data.value: Leave a request or calculate an approximate price. We will contact you and suggest the best laser show format.
